evals.prompt: I need to build a billing address form. It should have fields for first name, last name, address line 1, address line 2, city, and postcode. There should be a submit button at the bottom. On mobile the button should be full-width, but on desktop it should just be as wide as it needs to be.
evals.expected_output: A React component using hearth-react imports, Flex/Grid/Box layout components for structure, gap on parents not margin on children, responsive props with mobile key, no raw CSS values.

assertions.description: Uses Flex, Grid, or Box layout components instead of raw div elements for structure
Does not use raw CSS px values (e.g. style={{ padding: '16px' }})
Full-width mobile button handled via layout wrapper (alignItems or direction on Flex), not inline styles
Uses gap on parent container for spacing fields, not margin on individual sibling elements

evals.prompt: Create a user profile card component. It should show an avatar (just use initials), the user's name as a heading, their role as smaller text underneath, and an Edit button in the top-right corner. The card should have a subtle background and some padding.
evals.expected_output: A card component using hearth-react Card/Box/Flex primitives with semantic color tokens, Flex with justifyContent for layout, correct heading semantics with 'as' prop.

assertions.description: Uses Flex, Box, or Card layout primitives, not raw div elements
Edit button positioned via justifyContent on a Flex, not marginLeft='auto' hack
Heading component has an 'as' prop for semantic HTML hierarchy
Does not use raw hex color values in props (semantic tokens used instead)

evals.prompt: Add a cancel subscription modal. It should be triggered by a 'Cancel subscription' button. The modal should have a title, a short warning message, and two buttons at the bottom: a ghost 'Keep subscription' button and a solid red 'Cancel subscription' button. Make them stack on mobile.
evals.expected_output: A Modal using ModalRoot/ModalTrigger/ModalContent compound components, correct asChild usage, Flex layout for buttons with responsive direction prop including mobile key, gap not margin, ghost variant on Keep button.

assertions.description: Uses ModalRoot (or equivalent compound modal components) from hearth-react
Responsive button stacking handled via ModalFooter (built-in) or Flex with responsive direction
No margin used directly on Button siblings for spacing (ModalFooter or gap handles it)
